docs.title: Clinical analysis of resting blood pressure
docs.text:
Professional scientific software based on the European Society of Hypertension (ESH) 2023 Guidelines

[Get Started](getting-started.md){ .md-button .md-button--primary } [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/SportsLabResearch/SportsLabResearch-BloodPressure-Analyzer){ .md-button } [Downloads](downloads.md){ .md-button }

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
SportsLabResearch Blood Pressure Analyzer is an open scientific software platform developed for the automated analysis of resting blood pressure according to the recommendations of the European Society of Hypertension (ESH 2023).

The software imports blood pressure measurements, performs automatic quality control, calculates the selected baseline period and generates professional clinical reports.

docs.title: Main Features
docs.text:
Automatic graphical clinical summary.

Professional Word and Excel reports.

Baseline calculation and ESH 2023 interpretation.

Excel and CSV support.

docs.title: Clinical Workflow
docs.text:
Blood Pressure
      │
      ▼
Import
      │
      ▼
Quality Control
      │
      ▼
Baseline Analysis
      │
      ▼
ESH 2023 Interpretation
      │
      ▼
Dashboard
      │
      ▼
Word + Excel

docs.title: Project Status
docs.text: Component Status Excel Connector ✅ CSV Connector ✅ Dashboard ✅ Word Report ✅ Excel Report ✅ ESH 2023 ✅ Scientific Validation 🚧

docs.title: Scientific Framework
docs.text:
The software follows the recommendations of the European Society of Hypertension (ESH 2023).

Current home blood pressure threshold:

  • 135 mmHg systolic
  • 85 mmHg diastolic
**SportsLabResearch** Applied Science · Clinical Analytics · Open Research
